title: CaseConfiguration
description: Minimum creation inputs for a case (spec §8.1) plus optional near-core inputs (§8.2). Single-department scope in v1 (§8.4).

companyId.description: Top-level company identity that owns this case.

caseId.description: Stable unique identifier for the case.

domain.description: Selected domain from the supported domain list (§8.1).

mainDepartment.description: Selected main department from the supported list. One main department per case in v1 (§8.4).

companyProfileRef.description: Reference identifier for the company profile / company-context source registered in the case inventory.
